coverage.name: Constellation Energy
coverage.thesis: **pop_rank 1 - the day's strongest insulated RS leader.** Fresh all-time highs ~$273.5 (+4.3%) with the stop trailed up to $263 = gain locked green. Nuclear-for-AI power utility with NO own earnings tonight, so it is clean of the GOOGL/TSLA capex binary while a strong GOOGL cloud-capex print only adds fuel. Holds above the breakout - we trail, not trim.
coverage.hold_reason: Constellation is the nuclear utility powering the AI data-center boom - the cleanest way to own 'AI needs power' without chip-cycle risk. We are long 16 sh from $260.68 and it is at new highs today (+4.3%), the strongest name on our board, with the stop trailed to $263 so the gain is locked green. No earnings tonight means it rides the AI-power theme regardless of how Google or Tesla print - we hold and keep trailing.

projection.basis: new-highs RS leader; nuclear-for-AI power bid firm, binary-insulated

coverage.name: Nvidia
coverage.thesis: **pop_rank 2 - the direct GOOGL-capex read-through.** Long 90 sh from ~$208, +3.1% to ~$213.8 with a fresh tailwind from Super Micro's record AI-server backlog + a BofA server-CPU note + CNBC/Terranova buying. Stop $203. Tonight's GOOGL cloud-capex guide reads straight through to Nvidia demand - we hold into it with the stop as the backstop rather than trimming a winner early.
coverage.hold_reason: The core AI-chip name - we own 90 sh from ~$208 and it is +3.1% today, helped by Super Micro's record AI-server backlog. Stop is $203. Tonight's Google earnings are the swing factor: a strong cloud-capex guide reads straight through to Nvidia, so we hold into it with the stop as the backstop rather than trimming a winner early.

projection.basis: GOOGL-capex read-through tonight; recovered +3% off the open

coverage.name: Oklo Inc.
coverage.thesis: **pop_rank 3 - the binary-insulated catalyst swing, now LIVE.** The live one-tap FILLED at $44.43 on the base at 1:26pm ($39 GTC stop verified); paper holds 300 sh (stop $43). In the Trump/DOE $200M program to fast-track advanced reactors for AI data centers (MSFT/NVDA partners), Bloomberg-confirmed 7/21. Spiked to $47.51 AM, faded to the $44.4-44.9 shelf (the lower-risk entry). No own earnings to Aug 18 = does NOT ride tonight's binary; DOE summit details may drop today.
coverage.hold_reason: Small nuclear-reactor company just formally named into the Trump/DOE $200M program to power AI data centers alongside Microsoft and Nvidia - that government catalyst is what we bought. The live account finally got in at 1:26pm (16 sh @ $44.43 right on the base, $39 stop), and paper owns 300 sh near $44.6 (stop $43). It ran +7.6% this morning then gave it all back; we hold through the DOE catalyst window and cut only if $43/$39 breaks or the summit clearly disappoints.

feed.text: 2:47p - HOLD (no churn, ~1.1h to close): both books GTC-stopped/zero naked into tonight's GOOGL/TSLA binary. Own the insulated leaders (CEG +4.3% new highs, NVDA +3.1%, AMD +2.1%) + the live OKLO/DOE swing (summit details may drop today). Capture still ~13% of CEG (book +0.5%) - dragged by SMR -1.8%, flat OKLO + the chased RKLB entry - but correctly skipped SMCI's +21% gap. Regime: QQQ -0.2%, still under its 20-day = 3x gated. 0/3 day-trades.
Live's finally in - the OKLO one-tap filled at $44.43 right on the base, $39 GTC stop's on. Ends a week sitting in cash; DOE nuclear-for-AI catalyst, insulated from tonight's prints.

SMCI's +22% is a bullish AI-server read-through for held AMD/NVDA, not a chase. 0/3 day-trades.

Verified the OKLO/DOE nuclear-for-AI catalyst live (Bloomberg) + refreshed the live one-tap at the $44.6 base. Paper +0.86%, live flat cash (7th session = the real drag). 0/3 day-trades.

Kept the ~21% ($19k) powder DRY for the post-binary deploy rather than gambling it into the print. Honest ding: OKLO round-tripped its +7.6% spike to +1.3% and RKLB (bought near the top tick this AM) is red on entry - capture ~18%; we own the movers but the RKLB entry was chased. LIVE flat a 7th session; OKLO one-tap refreshed + live near the $44.7 base.

12:16p - HOLD & MANAGE (no churn 20 min post-rotation): all 6 paper names green + GTC-stopped into tonight's GOOGL/TSLA binary - RKLB +4.8% (biggest mover, held), CEG +3.5% new highs, OKLO +3.0% on the DOE AI-energy summit today, NVDA +2.8%, AMD +2.3%. Kept ~21% powder as dry ammo for a post-print dip. LIVE flat a 7th session, OKLO one-tap still armed - the only gap.

11:49a - ACTIVE ROTATION: cut the VRT laggard (only red name, -1.6%, ~-$158 realized) into RKLB, the watchlist's BIGGEST mover (+5.0%) on a fresh $266M Space Force contract - weighting the mover, not the laggard, and swapping capex-beta for a name insulated from tonight's binary. Trailed 3 winners' stops UP (OKLO $41.50->$43, CEG $255->$260, AMD $490->$515); all 6 paper GTC-stopped, zero naked. LIVE flat a 7th session - OKLO one-tap still armed, the only gap. Cut the only red name to fund the mover - opportunity cost is a sell signal. ~-$158 realized.
Bought the day's biggest watchlist mover on a fresh $266M Space Force contract. Owning the pop, not watching it.

Paper NVDA-anchor->nuclear-mover trim executes AT the open (real prices, clean stop re-arm), not into the pre-open low.
